CustomField.description: Determines the default task owner when an Engagement Plan Task's Assigned To field is blank. Can be the record owner or the user who creates the plan.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Who should unassigned tasks be given to: the owner of the related record or the user creating the Engagement Plan?
CustomField.label: Default Assignee

value.fullName: Owner of Object for Engagement Plan
value.label: Owner of Object for Engagement Plan
